hero.title: Developer Student Club Darmstadt
hero.subtitle: Bridging the gap between students and industry through innovation, collaboration, and support
hero.description: Join TU Darmstadt's developer community where students connect with leading companies, participate in exciting hackathons, and build the future of technology together.

about.title: What is DSC Darmstadt?
about.mission: We are a student-led community passionate about technology and innovation. Our mission is to connect students both together, and with industry leaders, provide hands-on learning opportunities, and foster a collaborative environment where the next generation of developers can thrive.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: Pushing boundaries and exploring various fields

collaboration.title: Collaboration
collaboration.description: Building strong partnerships between students and industry.

upcoming.title: Upcoming Events
upcoming.description: Don't miss out on our latest hackathons, workshops, and networking events

past.title: Past Events
past.description: Explore highlights from past hackathons, workshops, and meetups.

events.noUpcomingEvents: No upcoming events at the moment. Stay tuned! 😊

featured.description: See what our community is working on! 🤩

events.title: Events
events.description: Join us for exciting hackathons, technical workshops, and networking opportunities with industry leaders.
events.noUpcomingEvents: No upcoming events at the moment. Stay tuned for exciting announcements! 🤩
events.registerNow: Register now to secure your spot!

projects.title: Projects
projects.description: Have a look at what our community members are working on.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: Developer Student Club Darmstadt is a vibrant community at TU Darmstadt. We bridge the gap between academic learning and industry practice through hands-on projects, hackathons, and collaborative events with leading technology companies.

connect.title: Connect students with industry professionals and mentors
connect.description: Building meaningful relationships between students and tech industry professionals through mentorship programs and networking events.

skills.title: Develop practical skills through workshops and coding sessions
skills.description: Providing hands-on coding experiences, technical workshops, and project-based learning opportunities to enhance practical skills.

community.title: Build a supportive community of developers and innovators
community.description: Creating an inclusive and supportive environment where developers of all levels can learn, collaborate, and grow together.

opportunities.title: Create opportunities for internships and career advancement
opportunities.description: Connecting students with internship opportunities, job placements, and career development resources in the tech industry.

values.title: Our Values
values.description: The principles that guide everything we do at DSC Darmstadt

corevalue1.title: Teamwork
corevalue1.description: We work together, and push each other to learn, develop, and innovate.

corevalue2.title: Inclusivity
corevalue2.description: We welcome students from all backgrounds, majors, and skill levels! As long as you want to learn.

corevalue3.title: Transparency
corevalue3.description: We want you to be involved, we welcome everyone to our weekly orga meetings and discuss descisions publicly on our discord channel.

team.title: Our Team
team.description: Meet the Core Team behind DSC Darmstadt

contact.title: Get In Touch
contact.description: Ready to join our community or have questions? We'd love to hear from you!
contact.formDescription: Have a question or want to get involved? Drop us a message and we'll get back to you soon!
